channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration criticizes Machado's 'grotesque political opportunism' after Venezuela quakes
item.description: Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado's attempts to return home after recent earthquakes have drawn sharp criticism from the Trump administration.

item.title: House Democrats alarmed after another socialist primary upset
item.description: House Democrats were shaken Wednesday by the loss of another longtime colleague to a democratic socialist challenger.

item.title: Trump administration shifts focus after birthright citizenship defeat
item.description: After losing the birthright citizenship case at the Supreme Court, President Trump's aides and allies moved to a new plan.

item.title: U.S. and Iran resume talks in Doha over Strait of Hormuz tolls
item.description: U.S. and Iranian negotiators are in Doha for talks focusing on the Strait of Hormuz, with the U.S. arguing against tolls.
